headline: Binance Sees 9K BTC Daily Outflow Amid Selloff

article.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow
article.summary: Binance set multimonth records for net BTC outflows on Tuesday, adding to an emerging trend of positive inflows to the US spot Bitcoin ETFs.

headline: Zilliqa Vulnerability Exposes 1M Users to Key Theft Risk

article.title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
article.summary: A security vulnerability in the Zilliqa Ledger app is enabling attackers to reconstruct private keys using publicly available onchain data.

headline: Stocks Drop 2% as Brent Surges to $95

article.title: Stocks Fall Ahead of Alphabet as Brent Hits $95: Markets Wrap
article.summary: US stocks fell ahead of Alphabet Inc.’s earnings as traders awaited the latest read on whether spending by hyperscalers on artificial intelligence will pay off, while higher oil prices also weighed on sentiment.

headline: NovaGold Buys $100M Stake in Alaska Mine

article.title: NovaGold to Buy Billionaire Paulson’s Stake in Alaska Gold Mine
article.summary: NovaGold Resources Inc. agreed to acquire billionaire investor John Paulson’s 40% stake in the Donlin Gold project in Alaska, giving the company full ownership of a giant undeveloped bullion mine.

headline: Bitcoin Unfazed by Proof of Node, Holds $40k

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node

headline: Block Unveils $1B Bet on Nostr-Based AI Platform

article.summary: BIS says that FX restrictions and capital controls are less effective against stablecoins than against foreign currency bank deposits.

headline: US Seeks $25M Crypto Forfeiture Amid Fraud Probe

article.summary: US prosecutors seek forfeiture of $25 million in crypto recovered from five investigations into international fraud and laundering networks.

headline: UK's £1bn Uni Sector Faces Privatization Shock
